title: HelpDir
text: HelpDir Specifies the location where the online documentation is located. Applicable only for HTML or .hlp . HelpDir = DirectoryPath Default value: UnifaceApsDir /doc/help File section: [paths] Description This setting is only applicable if the following conditions are met: Online help documentation is available in native format, that is, as HTML files (if HtmlHelp is True) or .hlp files. Help is invoked in the application using the help ProcScript statement. The [HELP] INI file section lists the help files that can be called. Note: The WinHelp ( .hlp ) format is obsolete. The HELPDIR setting is not used to locate HTML Help ( .chm ) files. Related Links [help] The [help] section of the initialization file specifies the files to be used when online help is requested by the help ProcScript statement from a Uniface application, or within displayed messages.
